stemHtml:
Given the following NOTAM information, what changes apply to SID KOMIB 1E?

>>> EDDF (FRANKFURT MAIN) <<< DUE TO REVISED FREQUENCY ALLOCATION CHANGE CONTACT FREQUENCY AFTER TAKE-OFF FOR SID: RWY07: KOMIB 1E/2D. TO LANGEN RADAR 136.125 . REMARK CONTACT LANGEN RADAR WHEN ADVISED BY TOWER REMAINS. REF AIP AD 2 EDDF 5-7-11 / 5-7-13 ALL EFF 23 JUL 2015 . : NOTAM ED/A0198/16 >>> END-OF-BULLETIN <<<

options.a: CONTACT LANGEN RADAR IMMEDIATELY AFTER TAKEOFF ON 136.125.
options.b: CONTACT LANGEN ON 136.125 AND REMAIN ON TOWER FREQUENCY.
options.c: CONTACT TOWER WHEN ADVISED BY LANGEN ON 136.125.
options.d: CONTACT LANGEN RADAR WHEN ADVISED ON 136.125.
